notes: 20-question final review. Question 20 is an open writing task and should be corrected manually.

monday.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: We travelled by plane and arrived last night.
We travelled on plane and arrived in last night.
We travel by plane and arrived last night.
We were travel by plane and arrived last night.
monday.correctAnswer: We travelled by plane and arrived last night.

monday.correctAnswer: My boss is very kind, but he is also shy in meetings.
